hell_king_ev_001.title: Tax Chest
hell_king_ev_001.body: A chest creaks and opens all by itself. The ledgers love that.

hell_king_ev_002.title: Legion Review
hell_king_ev_002.body: The troops parade. Everyone is under pressure... even order.

hell_king_ev_003.title: Soul Market
hell_king_ev_003.body: The bids keep rising. The scribes note every sigh.

hell_king_ev_004.title: Party on the Surface
hell_king_ev_004.body: A night far too loud up above. The consequences come down fast.

hell_king_ev_005.title: Fast Recruitment
hell_king_ev_005.body: They recruit nonstop. Efficient... but the corridors are groaning.

hell_king_ev_006.title: Order Decree
hell_king_ev_006.body: A new decree comes down. It calms the crowds, not the leaders.

hell_king_ev_007.title: Profitable Pact
hell_king_ev_007.body: A pact brings in a lot. But everyone wants a share.

hell_king_ev_008.title: Rumor Above
hell_king_ev_008.body: A rumor spreads on the surface. You can already feel the wave coming.

hell_king_ev_009.title: Order Audit
hell_king_ev_009.body: The inspectors arrive. The rules tighten.

hell_king_ev_010.title: Drills
hell_king_ev_010.body: The legions train day and night. It looks impressive... and exhausting.

hell_king_ev_011.title: Harvest Bonus
hell_king_ev_011.body: An unexpected soul harvest. You take it, obviously.

hell_king_ev_012.title: Forbidden Carnival
hell_king_ev_012.body: An improvised carnival. Laughter rises, order falls.

hell_king_ev_013.title: Week of Discipline
hell_king_ev_013.body: They tighten the screws. Some are grinding their teeth.

hell_king_ev_014.title: Banner Parade
hell_king_ev_014.body: The banners snap in the wind. Appearances matter.

hell_king_ev_015.title: Signing Bonuses
hell_king_ev_015.body: Contracts are being signed. Lots of them. Very quickly.

hell_king_ev_016.title: Barracks Inspection
hell_king_ev_016.body: Surprise inspection. The officers pretend to be calm.

hell_king_ev_017.title: Tiny Riot
hell_king_ev_017.body: A small riot. Not a big deal... unless it lasts.

hell_king_ev_018.title: Desk Stampede
hell_king_ev_018.body: Too many requests, not enough patience. Classic.

hell_king_ev_020.title: VIP Evening
hell_king_ev_020.body: A very exclusive dinner. Alliances are made over dessert.

hell_king_ev_021.title: Rule of the Day
hell_king_ev_021.body: New rule. Nobody likes it, so it works.

hell_king_ev_022.title: Shortage
hell_king_ev_022.body: Something is missing. No one knows what, but everyone panics.

hell_king_ev_023.title: Tempting Offer
hell_king_ev_023.body: A brilliant offer. You know there's a catch. You take it anyway.

hell_king_ev_024.title: Fast Negotiation
hell_king_ev_024.body: A handshake, three signatures, and on to the next thing.

hell_king_ev_025.title: Surprise Transfer
hell_king_ev_025.body: Units are moved around. It reorganizes everything, including tempers.

hell_king_ev_026.title: Citation
hell_king_ev_026.body: A write-up lands on the desk. Nobody laughs.

hell_king_ev_027.title: Ritual Reward
hell_king_ev_027.body: The loyal are rewarded. The others glare.

hell_king_ev_028.title: Surface Panic
hell_king_ev_028.body: Up above, panic spreads. Down below, you cash in.

hell_king_ev_029.title: Test of Strength
hell_king_ev_029.body: Small test. Big egos. Result... mixed.

hell_king_ev_030.title: Internal Memo
hell_king_ev_030.body: A memo circulates. It always ends up on the wrong desk.
